summary: Backend API testing completed for auth token response changes (iteration 3). All 102 tests passing (32 new + 70 existing). Verified: access_token in login/register response body, Bearer token auth works for all endpoints, cookie auth fallback works, logout clears cookies.

Cookies set with samesite=none; secure=true for cross-site/iframe support
Bearer token auth (Authorization header) works for all 17+ protected endpoints tested
Cookie-based auth still works as fallback (backward compatibility maintained)
Logout correctly clears cookies and invalidates session
